messages.content: I had made a craft doll making youtube shorts video now make Strong SEO catchy title (65characters), description, tags for youtube shorts

Title:
"DIY Doll Creation Magic - Craft a Miniature Pal! #Shorts"

Description:
"🌟Transform simple materials into a charming craft doll with this quick and delightful guide! Perfect for beginners and craft lovers, our step-by-step #Shorts video shows you how to bring your miniature friend to life. Ideal for gifting or decorating—let's get crafting! 🔥✂️🧵 #DollMaking #CraftingShorts #DIYDolls"

Title:
"DIY Mini Doll Magic! Quick & Easy Crafting - YTShorts"

Description:
"Unleash your creativity in just minutes with our YouTube Shorts doll-making tutorial! Discover how to craft an adorable mini doll using simple materials you can find at home. Whether you're looking for a unique gift or just want to expand your crafting skills, follow our easy guide to create your very own handmade companion. Don't forget to like, share, and subscribe for more fun crafting ideas!"

PahalPix i am choosing give channel description under 700 chacters in english and hindi both I will post mixed shorts like cooking,construction,nature,pets,saloon etc all mix shorts my email <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_EMAIL_ADDRESS>

In English:
Welcome to PahalPix! Your one-stop channel for an eclectic mix of Shorts that celebrates the beauty of life. Dive into a world where cooking meets construction, nature mingles with pets, and salon secrets are unveiled. Each short is a step (pahal) towards something new and exciting. Subscribe for a daily dose of diversity!

In Hindi (इंग्लिश में अनुवादित):
पहलPix में आपका स्वागत है! जीवन की सुंदरता का जश्न मनाने वाले मिश्रित शॉर्ट्स के लिए आपका एकमात्र चैनल। जहाँ खाना बनाना कंस्ट्रक्शन से, प्रकृति पालतू जानवरों से और सैलून के राज़ खुलते हैं। हर शॉर्ट्स नई और रोमांचक चीज़ों की ओर (पहल) कदम है। विविधता की दैनिक खुराक के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें!

(Note: The description in Hindi is translated from the English version for consistency in messaging. The character count, including spaces, should be within the 700-character limit for both versions combined.)
